title: Who We Are
content:
Commencing operations in 1994 as a proprietary concern (Then known as FABTECH Services) Fabtech was inaugurated within the Fabtech Group of Companies in 1993. Fabtech International Limited (“the Company”) is incorporated in the British Virgin Islands (BVI) and registered with the Jebel Ali Free Zone Authority (JAFZA) through an entity called Fabtech International Limited (FIL). The address of the Company’s registered office is Vistra Corporate Services Centre, Wickhams Cay II, Road Town, Tortola, VG1110, British Virgin Islands. The registered address of FIL is P.O. Box 61015, Jebel Ali, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. Enjoying an impressive and consistent growth rate, the Fabtech Group of Companies has continued to increase and diversify its product offering and capacity over the years. The Fabtech Group of Companies can presently be considered as one of the leading companies in the region supplying services to the specialized engineering and fabrication industry, carrying out various projects for the Upstream and Downstream Oil & Gas & Petrochemicals, Water and Power, Cement and Allied Industries sectors.
The Fabtech Group has built its reputation on providing cost effective solutions to a growing number of repeat International Clientele and Consultants throughout the World. Appreciated for its quality work and close attention to Client needs and demands, Fabtech continues to pursue its chosen path to maintain and grow its current business model whilst investing significant time, energy and funds to venture into other product lines and solutions to cater for the ever changing environment.
A continued reinvestment of profits by our Owner and Chairman ensures the ongoing development of our Group and our continued commitment to fully modern and integrated workshops with the latest machinery to better serve our sectors.
The phenomenal growth of Fabtech can be attributed to the dedication of its hard working employees. With full management support, our visibility in Safety Consciousness and Awareness, Project Management, Engineering and Quality Assurance and a highly motivated workforce with an abundance of professionally maintained equipment, allows Fabtech the ability to pursue opportunities as they materialize.
With the wealth of experience, best of resources, guided by a highly ambitious management, Fabtech is setting its goal very high for the 21st Century.

Leverage collective genius

We are consistently open, honest, ethical and genuine


We use our drive and commitment to energize, engage and inspire others

No matter what we do, we make sure we do it well...

Support and grow
FABTECH is dedicated to providing services in the fields of Engineering, Fabrication and Industrial Coating to various industrial sectors and countries. FABTECH carries out its business activities in compliance with all local laws and regulations of the countries in which we operate. We promote: respect for life, human rights, cultural diversity, and the environment; ensuring employees’ health and safety at work while meeting corporate social responsibility commitments guided by strict business ethics and transparency.
FABTECH's integrated Quality, Health, Safety, and Environmental policy focuses on ensuring its own sustainable development, fulfilling customer expectations, and promoting employee development within safe and secure surroundings while protecting the environment.
FABTECH has highly qualified, motivated, and talented personnel who are committed to continuously improving their work processes in order to achieve the main objectives of this policy, namely:

Fabtech is committed to long-term, ethical, and environmentally responsible growth. Our corporate responsibility structure is built around four core pillars:
1. Environment
Reducing our footprint through science-based targets and sustainable practices.
2. Labor & Human Rights
Upholding dignity, safety, and inclusion across our workforce.
3. Ethics & Governance
Maintaining strict integrity and transparency in all operations.
4. Sustainable Procurement
Partnering responsibly across our entire supply chain.
2024 Highlights
